name: AWSCDKAssetComponent
title: AWS CDK Asset
description: Deploy AWS CDK stacks as a Dagster asset. Creates cloud infrastructure (S3, RDS, Glue, VPC, IAM, etc.) as the first step in a pipeline, with stack outputs surfaced as asset metadata for downstream assets to consume.

asset_name.description: Dagster asset key for this CDK deployment asset.

working_dir.description: Filesystem path to the directory containing cdk.json and the CDK app entry point.

stacks.description: Specific CDK stack names to deploy. When null all stacks are deployed (equivalent to cdk deploy "*").

context.description: CDK context key/value pairs passed as -c key=value arguments.

parameters.description: CloudFormation parameter overrides in StackName:ParameterName=value format, passed via --parameters.

require_approval.description: Approval level for security-sensitive changes. Use "never" for fully automated runs.

exclusively.description: Pass --exclusively to deploy only the listed stacks without deploying their dependency stacks.

hotswap.description: Pass --hotswap for faster deployments of Lambda functions and ECS services. Development environments only.

rollback.description: Roll back the stack on deployment failure. Set to false to leave the stack in a failed state for debugging.

outputs_file.description: Path where CDK writes stack outputs as JSON via --outputs-file. When null a path under /tmp is used automatically.

profile.description: AWS CLI profile name to use for authentication.

cdk_bin.description: Path or name of the CDK CLI executable. Must be available on PATH (installed via npm install -g aws-cdk).

env_vars.description: Additional environment variables to inject into the CDK subprocess.

description.description: Human-readable description surfaced in the Dagster UI.

deps.description: Dagster asset keys that this asset depends on.
